## Summary

<!-- Describe your changes in 1-3 sentences -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Performance improvement (`perf:`)
- [ ] CI/build/tooling (`ci:` / `chore:` / `build:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (add `!` after type, e.g. `feat!:`)

## Related issues

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run ci:check` passes locally (lint + typecheck)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Changes are covered by existing tests or new tests added
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
